hub.intro: View staff in your tenant: team overview, register performance, and shifts — without user administration.
hub.cardListDescription: Active and inactive tenant staff with role and last sign-in.
hub.cardPerformanceDescription: Revenue, transactions, and KPIs per cashier for the selected period.
hub.cardShiftsDescription: Open and closed shifts with start and end times.
hub.accessDeniedDescription: You need at least one staff-related permission (user.view, report.view, or shift.view).

list.readOnlyDescription: As a manager you can view staff. Create, edit, and deactivate require user management (user.manage).
list.accessDeniedDescription: You need the View users permission (user.view).
